description: scrub emails, API keys, bearer tokens, JWTs, phones, SSNs from a timeline JSON's text and window_title fields
rules: read-only / pure — no network, stdlib only
defense-in-depth over screenpipe's own PII removal, applied before any summary leaves the machine
placeholder-substitutes known secret-env assignments, bearer/JWT/API-key formats, emails, phones, SSNs
redacted timeline written to record_store as redacted.json
usage: Set INPUT (a timeline JSON array of {ts,app,window_title,text,content_type}). Output: redacted.json.
limitation: Regex-based defense-in-depth, not a guarantee; it scrubs the listed patterns only. Operates on the fetched timeline JSON, not raw OCR frames.
